notes: Suppresses NASEMSO/NREMT trauma call-type checklist for handlebar abdominal trauma scenario. Base rubric + scenario-specific shock recognition and transport items own all scoring; duplicate call-type rows would create false misses for stable-patient assessment steps.

operations.reason: Universal NREMT trauma base rubric owns PPE/BSI for this training scenario.
